name: yzmir-morphogenetic-rl
description: RL-controlled neural-network morphogenesis - design controllers that decide WHEN and HOW to grow a network during training. Covers controller action/observation/reward design, governor/safety-gate discipline, rollback-as-RL-signal shaping, deterministic morphogenesis, ablation/evaluation under topology change. Companion to yzmir-dynamic-architectures (which covers HOW the growable network trains).
